products.name: Vintage Nike Swoosh Tee
products.description: Classic 90s single-stitch Nike tee with center swoosh. Slightly faded — perfect vintage wash. No holes or stains.

products.name: Metallica Pushead Tour Tee
products.description: Original 1989 Metallica 'And Justice for All' tour tee with Pushead artwork on back. Single stitch, minor cracking on graphic. True vintage piece.

products.name: Umbro Checkerboard Shorts
products.description: Classic 90s Umbro checkerboard soccer shorts in black and white. Elastic waistband with drawstring. Lightweight nylon, no damage.

products.name: Champion Mesh Basketball Shorts
products.description: Vintage Champion mesh basketball shorts in navy with embroidered C logo. Elastic waist, side pockets. Minor pilling on inside.

products.name: Starter Chicago Bulls Jacket
products.description: Iconic 90s Starter satin jacket in Chicago Bulls red and black. Full snap front, embroidered bull logo on chest and large script on back. Clean lining, no rips.

products.name: Carhartt Detroit Jacket
products.description: Worn-in Carhartt Detroit jacket in duck brown canvas. Blanket-lined interior. Beautiful patina and natural distressing from years of use. Small repair on left cuff.

products.name: Levi's 501 Stonewash Jeans
products.description: Classic Levi's 501 button-fly jeans in medium stonewash. Made in USA with red tab. Broken in perfectly, no holes. Great natural fading on thighs.

products.name: Dickies 874 Original Fit
products.description: Vintage Dickies 874 work pants in khaki. Classic straight leg fit. These have the old-style Dickies tag. Clean with minimal wear.

products.name: Mitchell & Ness Bulls Jordan #23
products.description: Mitchell & Ness hardwood classics Michael Jordan Chicago Bulls jersey. Stitched lettering and numbers. Red with white and black trim. Pristine condition.

products.name: Starter Dallas Cowboys Jersey
products.description: 90s Starter Dallas Cowboys Aikman #8 jersey. Screen-printed numbers with mesh body. Some light snags on mesh but graphics are clean. Classic piece from the dynasty era.
